meta.name: process-factory-meta
meta.problemStatement: Operate the process factory: take in problems, gate every spec on operator approval, and deploy emitted packs only through draft PRs that carry their metrics manifests.

triageVerdict.evidence: No existing process pack operates the factory: src/factory/ pipeline stages do not exist yet, and no plugin in engram-plugins covers intake, spec approval, or factory deploy discipline.

inventory.name: process factory pipeline and meta pack

constraint.statement: Nothing enforces spec-approval-before-emit today: emission is reachable without an operator-approved spec.
exploitOptions: Add a blocking spec-approval gate between the spec and emit stages
subordinateOptions: Sequence emit and deploy strictly behind the approval gate; no stage reads a spec that has not passed it
elevateOptions: Make approval evidence cheap to review (validator results attached to the spec) so the gate never becomes the queue
constraint.evidence: The design's HITL stop-gate (spec section 4) is stated policy only; no mechanism in the repo blocks emit on approval.

truths.statement: A process spec must be operator-approved before emission.
truths.rationale: HITL stop-gate at the end of the spec stage; a factory that emits unapproved specs removes the human from the only structural checkpoint.

truths.statement: Every emitted pack must carry its metrics manifest (CTQs, baseline, decision rule, governance phase).
truths.rationale: Sensing is distributed: a pack born without its manifest can never report outcomes, so it can never be improved honestly.

truths.statement: Deploys land only as draft PRs into engram-plugins, never as direct pushes.
truths.rationale: D-016/D-065: every deployment gets adversarial review; the factory holds no merge authority.

subtasks.description: Receive an operator problem statement and record it as a factory intake request (problem, domain, requested scaling tier).
Hold every compiled spec at the approval gate until the operator explicitly approves it.
Deploy approved packs as draft PRs only, verifying the metrics manifest is present before the PR opens.

coverageMap.exclusionReason: Covered by the scan-cadence CTQ and control plan, not a v0 subtask; the scan stage arrives with the factory pipeline itself.

ctqs.specLimit: 100% of emitted packs trace to an operator-approved spec
ctqs.defectDefinition: an emitted pack whose spec has no recorded operator approval

ctqs.specLimit: every deployed pack passes mechanical validators before its draft PR opens
ctqs.defectDefinition: a draft PR opened from a pack that failed a mechanical validator or lacks its metrics manifest

ctqs.specLimit: every registry entry is scanned at least once per declared cadence window
ctqs.defectDefinition: a registry entry with no scan record inside its cadence window

contract.decisionRule: If any CTQ records a defect in a scan window, file an improvement proposal in the needs-review queue; two consecutive defective windows escalate to the operator.

controlPlan.monitoringCadence: every factory scan run, at least once per week
controlPlan.response: file an improvement proposal for operator review; never auto-apply

roles.name: intake-operator
roles.instructions: Receive the operator's problem statement. Restate it in one sentence, record the domain and the requested scaling tier, and confirm the restatement with the operator before any compilation begins.
roles.outputHint: An intake record: one-sentence problem statement, domain, scaling tier, operator confirmation.

artifacts.name: factory-intake
artifacts.l2Rationale: Intake is an operator-facing procedure, not an enforcement point: a skill is the cheapest intervention that standardizes it without blocking anything.

artifacts.name: spec-approval-gate
artifacts.l2Rationale: The constraint is policy-shaped: only a blocking gate turns approval-before-emit from a remembered rule into an enforced one.

artifacts.name: deploy-discipline-hook
artifacts.l2Rationale: Deploy discipline must fire on the deploy action itself: a hook on the deploy path checks draft-PR-only and metrics-manifest presence at the moment they can still be enforced.

knobs.name: scanMinSampleSize
knobs.purpose: Minimum outcome records required before a scan may file an improvement proposal — the factory refuses to propose from noise.
